name: Yoko, the Graceful Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>麗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うるわし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters / You can only control 1 "Yoko, the Graceful Mayakashi". You can only use each of these effects of "Yoko, the Graceful Mayakashi" once per turn.
● If a Synchro Monster in your possession whose original Level is 11 is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect while this card is in the GY: You can banish 1 other Zombie monster from your GY, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
● If this card is Special Summoned from the GY: You can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
